title: STAT+: CMS wants more drugmakers to join Medicaid ‘most-favored nations’ pilot
author: Elaine Chen
fullText:
More UniQure drama at the FDA, a new Medicaid pilot program, and other biotech news

Good morning. It’s March, which means it’s time again for STAT Madness, our annual bracket-style competition in which you vote on the most impactful biomedical research published in the past year. Voting is now open! Cast your vote here.
